name: @prune/waste-memo
description: F13 — cross-session recurring-waste memo. Mines a PII-safe, hashed longitudinal fingerprint store for a developer's RECURRING expensive patterns and produces a periodic digest (not a per-request nag). Deterministic grouping over caller-supplied opaque fingerprints + token/cost; ranks by cost when fully priced, else by tokens; never fabricates a number. Cross-session habit discovery — the delta vs in-session cache-habits. No regex, no model call.
